LSE-HS9-L3-1400P-HSVPA910-CSR-EUR-02 • Grade 9 • HS Visual and Performing Arts: Theatre, Grades 9–10

The Last Panel

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Analyze how the girl's two different descriptions make her decision necessary. Explain the logic connecting what each scene shows to what she is choosing between.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NCAS Pr4a  |  HS VPA Theatre Grades 9–10: Character Relationships in Drama
